title: Find My Device - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that granting "Allow While Using App" location permission in Find My Device displays the expected permission prompt, shows Location and Geo icons, and does not re-prompt after app restart.
expected: Location permission prompt appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow". After selecting "Allow while using app", Location and Geo icons become visible. After restarting the app, the user is not asked for consent again.
